gestures.mdmPrompt: The tutor raises both arms in a waving motion, inviting students' attention while asking about adding five.
The tutor points to an imaginary array in front, demonstrating the concept of five times five.
The tutor holds up both hands and counts out five fingers on each, encouraging students to create an array.
The tutor emphasizes with the left hand while recalling that five times five equals twenty-five.
